results.title: Know why people choose to turn off their application notification
results.description: Sick of all the dings and buzzes from your phone every day? results.title: Coal India to invest ₹1,900 cr in R&D by 2030 to support energy transition
results.description: The state-run miner will focus on clean coal, net-zero technologies, mine repurposing and critical mineral recovery through collaborations with research institutions
